title: fixes for tests
body:
- set require version of pillow to 9.5.0
- test-ffmpeg-reader - change duration number to match video
- ffmpeg-reader - add displaymatrix to be read as video rotation
- config set binary to autodetect

<!--
Please tick when you have done these. They don't need to all be completed before the PR is submitted.
Delete them if they are not appropriate for this pull request.
-->
- [x] I have provided code that clearly demonstrates the bug and that only works correctly when applying this fix
- [x] I have added suitable tests demonstrating a fixed bug or new/changed feature to the test suite in `tests/`
addresses issue #2183

step_plan.summary: This PR fixes tests by extending FFmpeg reader rotation detection to include displaymatrix metadata and by aligning the reported duration with the actual video duration.

steps.operation: Extend FFmpegInfosParser.video_metadata_type_casting to parse displaymatrix rotation data
steps.reason: To detect rotation information when ffmpeg provides rotation via the displaymatrix metadata, mapping it to the existing rotate handling for consistency
steps.side_effects: Adds displaymatrix parsing path; may require updates to tests that verify rotation; potential format assumption about displaymatrix keys; ensure backward compatibility with existing rotate metadata

steps.operation: Propagate computed video_duration to the duration field in FFmpegInfosParser.parse
steps.reason: Tests compare duration to video duration; ensure duration reflects actual video length by aligning with video_duration
steps.side_effects: Tests depending on duration value updated; ensure downstream consumers read consistent duration; minor risk if some files have mismatch between container duration and video length, but tests expect parity
